goal: Complete the Back-End Developer application at Quantum Paradigm autonomously until a protected or final review checkpoint.
summary: GradLaunch could not reuse your signed-in Chrome profile because Chrome is already using it. To open a new controlled tab in the same live browser session, start Chrome with remote debugging enabled and set BROWSER_CDP_URL, or fully quit Chrome and let GradLaunch relaunch your real profile.

subgoals.label: Open job page
subgoals.detail: Job page opened successfully in a visible Chrome session.
